scenario.name: UAC RFC 4733 DTMF
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:dtmf-test@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:dtmf-test@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: RFC 4733 DTMF Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=dtmftest 123456 123456 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=DTMF Test c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [auto_media_port] RTP/AVP 8 96 97 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:96 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:96 0-15 a=rtpmap:97 no-op/8000 a=sendrecv a=ptime:20

ACK sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:dtmf-test@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:dtmf-test@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 BYE Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
